description: FR-δ3 v2.1.11 GA baseline. Future versions assert ≥ these values to detect regression.
notes: Romance languages (es, fr, it) have low accuracy because the v2.1.11 detector narrows scope per RD-5 — only KO/EN are full-quality, others fall through to EN.
CJK languages (ja, zh) score 100% via script-based detection (Hiragana/Katakana/Kanji + Han).
German achieves 50% via umlaut detection (ü, ö, ä, ß).
Aggregate 68.75% reflects v2.1.11 narrowed scope. v2.1.12 may expand Romance language detection.
